title: rhododendron × salmoneum
intro: Rhododendron × salmoneum, also known as the salmon-leaved rhododendron, is a hybrid plant of the rhododendron genus, specifically a cross between Rhododendron dauricum and Rhododendron dauricum var. sachalinense. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron × salmoneum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
